title: The Rise of the Phoenix input

sites_to_scrape.title: Sites to scrape
sites_to_scrape.description: Optional list of site names from the JSON catalog. Leave empty to scrape all active sites.

site_category_filters.title: Site category filters
site_category_filters.description: Optional advanced overrides. Each entry limits one selected site to the listed category URLs.

category_urls.title: Category URLs
category_urls.description: One or more tracked category URLs for that site.

max_items_per_site.title: Max items per site
max_items_per_site.description: Upper bound used for testing and controlling each site run.

historic_cutoff_date.title: Historic cutoff date
historic_cutoff_date.description: ISO 8601 timestamp. If provided, the scraper runs in historic mode and stops once articles are older than this cutoff.

proxy_config.title: Proxy configuration
proxy_config.description: Select Apify Proxy or provide custom proxy URLs for difficult sites.
